name: Breaded Veal Cutlet (Weinerschnitzel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the veal into 1/2 inch thick slices for serving.
2. Season both sides with salt and pepper.
3. Dip each slice in cracker crumbs, then in beaten egg, then again in crumbs.
4. Let stand a few minutes to set the breadcrumbs.
5. Fry on both sides until golden brown.
6. Sprinkle with lemon juice and garnish with a fried egg per portion.
